The '''Skirmish at the Snow Palace''' was an altercation that ended the [[Odra crisis]]. During the course of the fight, the [[Snow King]]'s heart was melted, and he was restored to his natural state.

{{Battle-stub}}

*{{Ewoks|The Season Scepter}} {{1st}}
